title: White-Background Catalog Cleanup for a Firearms/Optics/Outdoor Shopify Store
one_line_ask: Take a batch of inconsistent distributor-supplied product photos for a firearms/optics/outdoor Shopify store and turn them into clean, straightened, color-corrected, pure-white-background, square marketplace hero images (plus transparent-PNG tile variants and a vectorized listing badge), all organized into a review board and a tidy asset folder.

panel.text_found: Left arrow, M, Up arrow, Right arrow, Power symbol, USB symbol

issues: Very slight clockwise tilt present but arguably under 4 degrees — within acceptable range
Warm tungsten color cast is present but subtle, could be slightly more pronounced per brief
Shadow under scope is mild and soft — acceptable per brief
Background is off-white/cream rather than pure gray — acceptable per brief
Loose framing with uneven margins present as intended
Subject is sharp, centered, and clearly identifiable as a thermal weapon scope with Picatinny rail mount, rubberized eyepiece, and control buttons visible

Asset is shown on a laptop screen rather than as a direct PNG file, introducing minor reflections and slight perspective distortion, but the logo itself is clear and meets all brief requirements for a source input file.
Checkered transparency pattern visible behind logo (expected for PNG with transparent background, not a flaw)
Slight perspective distortion from laptop screen angle (acceptable as realistic source-file mockup context)
Logo appears on laptop screen rather than as isolated file, but subject is clearly legible and well-centered
